requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 vs China GB/T
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2与中国GB/T
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2與中國GB/T

summary.en: Sao Tome and Principe has Portuguese and IEC legacy electrical practice and no confirmed domestic EV connector standard. For new public or donor-funded charging infrastructure, the practical technical direction is IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC charging and CCS2 for DC charging, matching European and Lusophone supply chains and 50 Hz IEC infrastructure. This is not an Americas-style J1772/NACS market assumption. Connector requirements should be confirmed in the tender, site-owner specification, vehicle-import plan, or utility project file before procurement.
summary.zh: 圣多美和普林西比具有葡语国家和IEC体系电气传统，未能确认其有本国电动汽车接口标准。对于新的公共或援助资金充电基础设施，实务技术方向是交流采用IEC 62196 Type 2、直流采用CCS2，与欧洲及葡语供应链和50 Hz IEC基础设施相匹配。不应按美洲J1772/NACS市场假设处理。采购前应在招标、场地方规范、车辆进口计划或公用事业项目文件中确认接口要求。
summary.zht: 聖多美和普林西比具有葡語國家和IEC體系電氣傳統，未能確認其有本國電動汽車接口標準。對於新的公共或援助資金充電基礎設施，實務技術方向是交流採用IEC 62196 Type 2、直流採用CCS2，與歐洲及葡語供應鏈和50 Hz IEC基礎設施相匹配。不應按美洲J1772/NACS市場假設處理。採購前應在招標、場地方規範、車輛進口計劃或公用事業項目文件中確認接口要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-23 and IEC 61851-24 — DC charging equipment and communication

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC and Type 2 are not interchangeable because connector gender, pilot signaling, and contact arrangements differ. GB/T DC uses a different connector geometry and GB/T 27930 CAN communication, which is not a CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 implementation. China connector conformity is therefore not accepted as a Type 2 / CCS2 substitute.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口与Type 2不能互换，因为接口性别、导引信号和触点布置不同。GB/T直流接口几何形状不同，并采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，不属于CCS2 / IEC 61851-24实现。因此，中国接口符合性不能替代Type 2 / CCS2。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口與Type 2不能互換，因為接口性別、導引信號和觸點布置不同。GB/T直流接口幾何形狀不同，並採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，不屬於CCS2 / IEC 61851-24實現。因此，中國接口符合性不能替代Type 2 / CCS2。

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger should be treated as connector-incompatible for Sao Tome and Principe Type 2 / CCS2 projects. Conversion requires hardware redesign of couplers, cables, locking, pilot signaling, labels, spare parts, temperature-rise evidence, and DC communication stack. Do not quote a China domestic GB/T model for an IEC Type 2 / CCS2 tender unless the product variant and test evidence are actually converted.
gap.zh: 仅支持GB/T的充电桩应视为不兼容圣多美和普林西比Type 2 / CCS2项目。转换需要重新设计耦合器、电缆、锁止、导引信号、标签、备件、温升证据及直流通信栈。除非产品版本和测试证据已实际转换，否则不应以中国国内GB/T机型投标IEC Type 2 / CCS2项目。
gap.zht: 僅支持GB/T的充電樁應視為不兼容聖多美和普林西比Type 2 / CCS2項目。轉換需要重新設計耦合器、電纜、鎖止、導引信號、標籤、備件、溫升證據及直流通訊棧。除非產品版本和測試證據已實際轉換，否則不應以中國國內GB/T機型投標IEC Type 2 / CCS2項目。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is specified by tender, vehicle fleet, site owner, donor, or utility project requirements; no confirmed national EV connector regulation
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For this IEC-oriented 50 Hz market, assume Type 2 AC and CCS2 DC unless the project file says otherwise. China GB/T connectors are physically and electrically incompatible and cannot be accepted by paperwork alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于该IEC导向的50 Hz市场，除非项目文件另有规定，应按交流Type 2和直流CCS2处理。中国GB/T接口在物理和电气上均不兼容，不能仅通过文件替换获得接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於該IEC導向的50 Hz市場，除非項目文件另有規定，應按交流Type 2和直流CCS2處理。中國GB/T接口在物理和電氣上均不兼容，不能僅通過文件替換獲得接受。
